title: chrysanthemum viscide-hirtum
intro: Chrysanthemum viscide-hirtum, also known as Yomogi or Japanese Silver Burdock, is a perennial plant species native to East Asia, particularly in China, Japan, and Korea. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Chrysanthemum viscide-hirtum is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant's extracts have been found to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating cough and sore throat, and supporting respiratory health. Chrysanthemum viscide-hirtum is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or powder, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine and Korean herbal remedies.
